title: Legendares Weapons 2
body:
![dassas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a31800dc1f18d67a20cfbf48a48e2c82f0b8324a.png)
Legendares Weapons 2 is a sequel to the craziest and most epic weapons mod!
This mod is in early stage but will be continuously developed! Mod is for Forge 1.20.1 and Neoforge 1.21.1.

![ss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26dd801f4dbb3d126613166ec469ca46bc7fefc3.png)



![zz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7bbd807faac13ff0336c5903311a9aa29b1c59c.png)

Ravacoro is your new ally in battle! He follows you and attacks enemies!

![zz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fb06c0cdbff33e0b1ff45487d114a122cfcd4e3.gif)

![qfg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c628236d3f0dace136c4e9fcd1caf0532d45a00f.gif)


RailsMaster is the fastest way to build rails!

![zzz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a7dad2649beb95816cc0743f878b39f9283d165.gif)


Farm enchantments with Enchantiser!

![vvv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4078a583df53d8d09c43e47e7b7f5f79cc6ccd2d.gif)

![mnm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46099490f13f1d243a4380663252da36b9d99dcb.gif)


Shoot blocks at your enemies with Revotor!

![vvvx](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbbef892d162e1fe111e73d299b10a55a7ec189f.gif)

Need a mining assistant? Use Mineron!

![zxczxc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a15ce5b3dbd3c4a6dbe6e6afc5c0a6893c74ca18.gif)

Attract blocks with Magnetasis!

![zxczxc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aa21d4562c3370387eff5295dfb90cd0224b477.gif)

Strike lightnings with Mjöllnir!

![cbvcvb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bc52fa78d4be1e97f055e82b334e55184f10b1b.gif)


![vvbnnnbh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc6e1f484b9beaac3cd3ce6e500540e739e5aa1a.png)


PENDOLINO 3000

![cvc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62ac7a4bb70d1ec92724151f40ee182c9b4ebd69.png)

1. Engine: 7.3 LITER V12
1. Power: 650 HP
1. V-MAX: 330 KM/H
1. 0-100: 3 seconds
1. 0-330: 10 seconds

PENDOLINO 5000

![mmnmn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca9caaa77eebf934544588dc3900e06aec1f38a8.png)

![sdfsdfqe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98fb41c791ce7d62fb46fe2d7ed5a0d1a5fa3bb2.gif)

1. Engine: 7.0 LITER QUAD-TURBO V12
1. Power: 1200 HP
1. V-MAX: 610 KM/H
1. 0-100: 2.5 seconds
1. 0-610: 15 seconds

PENDOLINO 1500 (CARGO)

![mnnnnbb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c27c0c4781c3bb562355f0be2ca53648f36a8266.png)

1. Engine: 6.2 LITER SUPERCHARGED V8
1. Power: 717 HP
1. V-MAX: 270 KM/H
1. 0-100: 4 seconds
1. 0-610: 17 seconds

HYPER BOAT

![pppoop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdda07dea73ce2ee810236bc2d77950b5a128f14.png)

1. Engine: OCTO V10 TURBO
1. Power: 1500 HP
1. V-MAX: 800 KM/H (On ice 1200 KM/H)
1. 0-100:  1.5 seconds
1. 0-800: 10 seconds
   
PENDOLINO 6000 (CARGO WITH 35 WAGONS)

![ccccc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3830db37dc17d9c21f49acb126ddfd19f52cd2b4.png)

1. Engine: 25.0 LITER W32 QUAD TURBO
1. Power: 3700 HP
1. V-MAX: 450 KM/H 
1. 0-100:  15 seconds
1. 0-450: 60 seconds (sometimes more)

PENDOLINO 8000

![zzzzz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/954646d6c50762d1854aea5426b2da3b98b0ce50.png)

1. Engine: Four engines 3.2 LITER VR6 TWIN TURBO 
1. Power: 2800 HP
1. V-MAX: 3000 KM/H 
1. 0-100:  0.8 seconds
1. 0-3000: 13 seconds

PENDOLINO DIGGER

![NNNN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c97aaec7418173ba5dfcdafe6e85048fa90970b0.png)

1. Engine: V12 7.2 LITER
1. Power: 1200 HP
1. V-MAX: 200 KM/H 
1. Used for mining!

USE THIS WHEN YOU STUCK IN VEHICLE!

![ZXZX](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f2ceb6bced62b9dd64e762c4a63f96caec3b6ee_0.webp)


AND MUCH MORE!

MOD SHOWCASES:

VERSION 1.0 - 1.2

![klkkl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e2aafb86c8677d52c2ef439a9f8c65994b30f44.png)
https://youtu.be/_iVWah_5W4M

VERSION 1.3 - 1.5

![cvbncbnx](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7989d5b91053bff7079f9e4d4a9c8a40cd5a434e.png)

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GpXTVkamVGQ

Mjöllnir showcase - VERSION 1.6

![nbcvncb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a6e09aadcff1a8216135621513660d1c6ba0296.png)

https://youtu.be/Z7Bju7qfSew
 
Haven't played the previous part? Give it a chance!

![zsszzs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c04531ac722212e212f4194d8763ce28e2fabfd1.jpeg)

https://modrinth.com/mod/legendares-weapons

HAVE FUN!
YOU CAN ALSO USE THIS MOD IN MODPACKS!
